name: research-pack
description: Deep research workflows: source gathering, verification, synthesis, and reporting.
author: Agent Swarm

skills.name: SourceVerification
skills.principle: Cross-reference claims against 3+ independent sources. Flag single-source claims.

skills.name: QuantitativeExtraction
skills.principle: Extract numerical data, dates, percentages, and metrics. Present with source attribution.
skills.when_to_apply: data extraction, numbers, metrics, statistics, quantitative

skills.name: CompetitiveLandscape
skills.principle: Map competitors by market position, pricing, features, and differentiation. Use SWOT framework.
skills.when_to_apply: competitor, market analysis, landscape, positioning, SWOT

skills.name: SynthesisReport
skills.principle: Combine multiple research outputs into a coherent narrative with executive summary, key findings, and recommendations.
skills.when_to_apply: synthesis, report, summary, combine findings, executive summary

ontology_terms.label: Data Extraction
ontology_terms.definition: Extract structured data from unstructured sources

ontology_terms.label: Synthesis
ontology_terms.definition: Combine multiple inputs into coherent output

ontology_terms.label: Research Brief
ontology_terms.definition: Concise research summary with key findings

competency_questions: What sources does this research require verification for?
What quantitative data can be extracted from these sources?
How should multiple research findings be synthesized?
